notes: Page exists (updated Oct 2024); covers interventions for sleep improvement — not the health consequences of sleep itself. 106 trials, 31982 participants. Relevant as supporting reference for intervention landscape only.
2025 meta-analysis; imbalanced sleep (short or long) increases all-cause mortality 14-34%; confirms U-shaped dose-response
2018 dose-response meta-analysis; U-shaped relationship confirmed; 7hr optimal; each 1hr below 7hr: RR 1.06 all-cause mortality; poor sleep quality linked to coronary heart disease (RR 1.44)

2025 narrative review; sleep and cardiometabolic health; mechanisms: insulin resistance, sympathetic overactivity, hormonal disruption, systemic inflammation; healthy sleep now included in public health CVD metrics
